title: ayenia lasiophylla
intro: Ayenia lasiophylla, also known as the small-leaved ayenia or ayenia, is a type of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds and skin irritations due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. It is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing. Ayenia lasiophylla is commonly prepared as a tea or infused in oil for its medicinal uses, and its leaves and roots are also used in traditional herbal remedies.
